title: Pickaxe 3x3
body:
![image](https://proxy.spigotmc.org/0026b4638f33036ae97d445c53e3427e95089387/68747470733a2f2f737069676f746d632e72752f6174746163686d656e74732f6d696e6563726166745f7469746c652d322d706e672e33323034372f)

☁ Information:
Are you tired of the monotonous task of mining block by block? Want to speed up your resource gathering and make your gameplay more exciting? Introducing Pickaxe 3x3 — an innovative Minecraft plugin that allows players to mine a 3x3 area with a special pickaxe!

This plugin not only saves your time but also makes the game more engaging by adding new mechanics and features!

✨ Key Features:
3x3 Mining: With this plugin, players can use a special pickaxe to mine 9 blocks (3x3) with a single hit! Perfect for faster mining in caves and large excavations.

Customizable Pickaxe Durability: Choose whether the pickaxe will be unbreakable or subject to wear and tear based on the configuration. An infinite pickaxe or realistic wear — the choice is yours!

WorldGuard Support: The plugin is fully compatible with WorldGuard, allowing you to control which players can use the 3x3 pickaxe in specific regions. The pickaxe won't break blocks in areas where the player doesn't have permission.

Ease of Use: An easily configurable settings file lets you quickly and conveniently change the plugin's behavior to suit your game server.

Support for All Worlds: An option to exclude certain worlds ensures that the 3x3 pickaxe won't be used in undesired areas, such as PvP arenas or building zones.

⚙️ Configuration:
All you need to do is install the plugin on your server, and it's ready to go! Customize your preferences in the config.yml file:

1. breakable_fast: This function is responsible for the strength of the pickaxe."true" - the pickaxe loses 9% of its strength when broken.

2. regions: Setting up for regions in the WorldGuard plugin.

3. legacy: The pickaxe breaks 3 by 3 blocks as before.

4. lore: The pickaxe now has a description.

5. disabled_worlds: List the worlds where the 3x3 pickaxe will be disabled.

6. enchantments: Choose the enchantments to be applied when the pickaxe is given!

7. unbreakable_pickaxe: Set to true for an unbreakable pickaxe or false for a pickaxe with durability.

![bstats](https://proxy.spigotmc.org/1db96d276251e4f0a5f2f1fc157a0c1f4fa68f3d/68747470733a2f2f6273746174732e6f72672f7369676e6174757265732f62756b6b69742f5069636b6178652532303378332e737667)

Requirements:

- Server Version: Minecraft 1.16+

Support and Contact:
If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to reach out to us on this forum. We are always happy to help you!

Permissions: pickaxe3x3.admin

Command: /pickaxe3x3
